_meta.schema: pathname → list of 4 Chinese highlight bullets (long form). Used by scraper/social.py to render the 3-up detail slides for top prelaunch / top live.
_meta.guidance: Each highlight 16–32 Chinese chars. Lead with the spec or feature. Avoid marketing fluff. Order by importance.
_meta.fallback: Projects without an entry here use English |-split blurb extracted at runtime — uglier on slides, prompt for PR / cron LLM auto-translate later.
